title: Rust: TX queue spec compliance (capacity, deadline, preemption)
description:
rust/lichen-core/src/tx_queue.rs partially implemented but not spec-compliant:

1. TX_QUEUE_CAPACITY=32, spec §3 requires 4
2. No deadline expiry (spec: 5s routing, 10s ACK, 60s app default)
3. No preemption (when full, returns QueueFull instead of preempting lower priority)

Required changes:
- Reduce capacity to 4
- Add deadline_ms field to TxItem
- Add expire_oldest() method to drop expired packets
- Add preemption: when full and new packet has higher priority, evict lowest priority packet

See spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md §3 TX Queue for requirements.
close_reason: Implemented spec-compliant TX queue: capacity 4 (was 32), deadline_ms field with expiry (5s routing, 10s control, 60s user/bulk), priority preemption when full, latency tracking in stats
